name: Chain Summon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>連</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>鎖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>さ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>召</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>喚</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control 2 or more face-up Xyz Monsters: Target the one with the lowest Rank (your choice, if tied); Special Summon 1 Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, whose Rank is lower than that Xyz Monster, but the Special Summoned monster cannot attack directly, also return it to the Extra Deck during the End Phase.
eff: If you control 2 or more face-up Xyz Monsters: Target the one with the lowest Rank (your choice, if tied); Special Summon 1 Xyz Monster from your Extra Deck, whose Rank is lower than that Xyz Monster, but the Special Summoned monster cannot attack directly, also return it to the Extra Deck during the End Phase.

action: Returns from your field to your Extra Deck
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
